normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 3.5 - Home Occupations and Home Businesses Relative to Sexual Services Businesses
scope_summary: Guides the determination of applications for Home Occupation or Home Business approval where the proposed activity is a Sexual Services Business, within the Residential zones of the City of Melville. Council will not grant Home Occupation or Home Business approval for the establishment and conduct of a Sexual Services Business, and the policy defines 'Nuisance' to provide clarity in the determination of all home occupation applications. Prepared in the context of the (unproclaimed) Prostitution Amendment Act 2008.

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
